;;; intersection
  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (intersection 
      (superpose (a b (+ 2 3) c)) 
      (superpose (b c (+ 2 3) c c d))) 
    (b 5 c))

[

;
;; HYPERON-METTALOG-SANITY.BASE-TEST-REPR-PARSE-INTERSECTION.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.052 secs. (51.70 milliseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (intersection 
      (superpose (a b (+ 2 3) c)) 
      (superpose (b c (+ 2 3) c c d))) 
    (b 5 c))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      (b 5 c c c) 
      (b 5 c)))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_19654))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (intersection 
            (superpose (a b (+ 2 3) c)) 
            (superpose (b c (+ 2 3) c c d))) 
          (b 5 c)) $_3426) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3990) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3426 $_4018) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3130) $_4018)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_19654))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (intersection 
            (superpose (a b (+ 2 3) c)) 
            (superpose (b c (+ 2 3) c c d))) 
          (b 5 c)) $_3426) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3990) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3426 $_4018) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3130) $_4018)))))
